title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Speciality Restaurants - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Speciality Restaurants - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Speciality Restaurants is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Speciality Restaurants:
Speciality Restaurants is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Speciality Restaurants!
